name: Spanakopitta Me Avga (Spinach Pie W/eggs)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash spinach thoroughly in plenty of water and cut into small pieces.
2. Place the spinach in a bowl. Salt lightly and stir to spread the salt evenly.
3. Take spinach by handfuls and squeeze out excess water; place in another bowl.
4. Sauté onion in half the butter until light golden. Add scallions and cook until wilted.
5. Add spinach, stirring until vegetables have a light color. Stir in dill, parsley, salt, and pepper.
6. Cover pot and continue cooking until all absorbed water from spinach is gone.
7. Remove from heat; add milk to cool the spinach mixture.
8. Beat eggs in another bowl; stir in cheese.
9. Mix egg-cheese mixture with cooled spinach.
10. Line a pan with 8 sheets of phyllo, brushing each sheet with melted butter before adding the next.
11. Pour in the spinach mixture and spread evenly over phyllo.
12. Fold the excess phyllo back over the filling.
13. Lay remaining phyllo on top, brushing each sheet with melted butter before adding the next.
14. Trim overlaps; brush additional butter on top.
15. Score into square or diamond-shaped serving pieces.
16. Bake for 30-45 minutes in a preheated 300°F oven. Let stand for 30 minutes before serving.
NOTE: Spinach can also be used without precooking. Squeeze excess water, mix with seasonings, and proceed as above, baking for 1 hour.
